productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Vue Sleeve Black Bags
description: Carry your netbook in style and absolute safety in this Vue Sleeve Bag from belkin. Made of a synthetic-elastane blend material, this bag protects your netbook from mild impact. With stretchable properties, it can easily accommodate the accessories as well. Netbook size: 10.2" Made of a synthetic-elastane blend fabric to stretch easily Synthetic leather patch with criss-cross grooved design for grip while carrying the bag and to use as a mouse pad Has a branded zipper and slider Mildly expandable to hold a netbook and accessories Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
